title: Must successfully assign a user and case role without organisation ID for an unrestricted caller
specs: Richard - who can create a case
Admin - who has only caseworker-caa role
Dil - who is to add some case role assignment for a case
Olawale - with an active solicitor profile
is made from an authorised application, by Admin, with the Case ID of C1, User ID of Olawale and a proper Case Role CR-1 but no Organisation ID
